sentences.translation: Dobar san je važan za zdravlje uma.
sentences.translationEn: Good sleep is important for the health of the mind.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ لَا يَنَامُ الإِنْسَانُ جَيِّدًا يَشْعُرُ بِالتَّعَبِ وَالتَّوَتُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Kada čovjek ne spava dobro osjeća umor i napetost.
sentences.translationEn: When a person does not sleep well they feel tired and tense.

sentences.arabic: نَامَتْ دِينَا ثَمَانِيَ سَاعَاتٍ وَاسْتَيْقَظَتْ بِنَشَاطٍ.
sentences.translation: Dina je spavala osam sati i probudila se aktivno.
sentences.translationEn: Dina slept eight hours and woke up energetically.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ تَرْكِيزُهَا فِي الْمَدْرَسَةِ أَفْضَلَ ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Koncentracija joj je bila bolja u školi tog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Her concentration at school was better that day.
